notes: ENTREPRENEURSHIP + STARTUP CULTURE + VENTURE CAPITAL scan. 10 niches confirmed blue ocean. 0 duplicates filtered. Key finding: VC Fundamentals (25/25) and Product-Market Fit (25/25) are max-score niches — both backed by massive communities (9.8M and 7.8M respectively) and zero exact-match apps. SaaS Metrics (24/25) and Fundraising Strategy (24/25) follow close behind with large professional communities who pay premium for structured learning content. The entrepreneurship category uniquely spans a high-WTP audience: MBA students, aspiring VCs, founders, and operators who invest heavily in education and have institutional or startup-backed income. Price ceiling for this category is $9.99/mo — highest in the entire scan so far. Startup Law & Equity Mechanics (23/25) is the most underserved niche with the highest financial consequence for ignorance — missing an 83(b) election or QSBS qualification can cost founders $1M+ in unnecessary taxes. This is the 'I didn't know what I didn't know' learning market at its most acute.
